summary: I'm a Computer Science graduate specializing in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and full-stack development.

projects.name: Fake News Detection System
projects.type: Research Paper (Bachelor's Final Year Project & Research Publication)
projects.domain: Natural Language Processing, Text Classification, Machine Learning
projects.description: Designed and implemented the Python-based machine learning backend for a fake news detection system.
features: Performed manual data collection of real-world fake and true news articles with extensive preprocessing for noisy and unstructured data
Applied TF-IDF vectorization for text representation
Trained and evaluated multiple supervised learning models: Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Gradient Boosting, and Random Forest
Conducted comparative performance analysis using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score

projects.name: Multilingual Translation & Transliteration System
projects.type: Minor in Artificial Intelligence – Final Assignment
projects.description: End-to-end multilingual NLP system supporting translation across five languages using pre-trained transformer-based models.
features: Supported translation across five languages (English, Hindi, Japanese, Chinese, Russian) using pre-trained transformer models
Implemented and evaluated training, inference, and testing workflows for multilingual text processing
Integrated speech-to-text and text-to-speech for a multimodal text and audio processing pipeline
Deployed an interactive Streamlit interface for real-time translation, transliteration, and speech processing
